title: 4pcs Kids Toiletry Wash Bag Travel Solid Color Waterproof Dumpling Shape Make Up Organisers Convenient Women Girls
features: Premium Materials:Kids toiletry bag made of high quality materials,nice lining and reliable zipper closure to keep everything neat and tidy.Our toiletry bags perfectly combine functionality and style being bright,colourful and good-looking embellishments.

Packaging Includes:Get 4 dumpling shaped makeup bags in various colors,including black,rose,royal blue,and purple,to meet your daily needs.You can even sort your items by colour.With this toiletry bag,you can simply throw in your items,close in one swift pull,and be ready.

Strong Practicality:This travel wash bag is perfect for storing toiletries,such as toothbrushes,face wash,and towels.It can also hold small wallets,bank cards,keys,medicines,and jewelry.Use it as a pencil case for students.

Multi-Functional Washbag:Small wash bag is suitable for travel,vacation,business trip,gym,camping,bathroom organization and outdoor activity.You can use makeup bag as a pencil bag,makeup bag, travel bag, sundries bag.

Perfect Gift:Girls wash bag great for everyday use or travel.This would be an enjoyable gift for the back-to-school day,birthdays,valentine's day,mother's day,children's day,thanksgiving day,christmas day.Making them ideal for use as wash/shower bags especially in a festival or camping environment.
